description_for_human: AI social media marketing automation — create, schedule, and auto-publish to X with 49 AI models.
description_for_model: xPilot is an AI-powered social media marketing platform. It has 49 AI models (13 free) for text, image, and video generation. Features include auto-posting to X (Twitter), AI video generation (Seedance, Wan, Kling), AI image generation (FLUX, Seedream), post-production tools (SAM2 tracking, AI editing), campaign management, knowledge base, and analytics. Free to start with $5 credit. Supports 5 languages. Website: https://xpilot.jytech.us
